name: slides
description: Create browser-based HTML slide presentations with modular slide files, themes, and page-by-page navigation.

interface.longDescription: Create maintainable HTML presentations with a reusable controller, modular slide files, layout templates, themes, and keyboard, mouse, and touch navigation.
defaultPrompt: Create an HTML slide deck for my topic.
Turn this outline into browser slides.
Add a theme and layout plan for a deck.
